title: No Clouds
description: No more clouds clear view - Little Higher Fps
body:
**Works Fine from 1.14 to 1.21.11, It can shows warning while applying don't worry it will work fine**
# ☁️❌ No Clouds – Clear Sky, Better FPS

No More Clouds - Clear Sky - Better Little Fps Boost

---

## ✅ Features
- Works from **1.14 → 1.21.8**
- Reduces FPS in overworld.
- Removes clouds totally.
- Purely visual – no gameplay changes

---

## ⚡ Performance
- Little Fps Boost BCZ **Gpu will load no more Clouds**

---

## ⚠️ Compatibility Note
- Tested on Vanilla Minecraft Only
- Not Tested with Mods
